role.title: Security
role.description: Advises on and enforces security best practices within the repository.

responsibilities.item: Ensure that the repository enables Dependabot alerts, secret scanning and push protection.
Maintain the `SECURITY.md` file, including contact information and disclosure procedures.
Review dependencies for known vulnerabilities and approve updates when necessary.
Define and enforce policies for storing secrets, API keys and other sensitive data. Never commit secrets to the repository.
Advise developers on secure coding practices (e.g., input validation, output sanitisation, least privilege).
Work with maintainers to respond to vulnerability reports and coordinate responsible disclosure.

escalation.item: Escalate critical vulnerabilities or compliance breaches to project leadership immediately.
Pause merges if a change introduces a security regression.
